mapper.sql: p.id, p.goods_id, p.supplier_id, p.buy_num, p.buy_price, p.total_money, p.user_id, p.status, p.buy_time, p.create_time, p.update_time
mapper.insert: insert into purchase_order ( goods_id, supplier_id, buy_num, buy_price, total_money, user_id, status, buy_time, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{goodsId}, #{supplierId}, #{buyNum}, #{buyPrice}, #{totalMoney}, #{userId}, #{status}, #{buyTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update purchase_order
goods_id = #{goodsId},
supplier_id = #{supplierId},
buy_num = #{buyNum},
buy_price = #{buyPrice},
total_money = #{totalMoney},
user_id = #{userId},
status = #{status},
buy_time = #{buyTime},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT , g.goods_name AS goodsName, s.supplier_name AS supplierName, AS userName FROM purchase_order p LEFT JOIN goods g ON p.goods_id = g.id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
